## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --locked --all-targets --all-features`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`

## Release Notes

- [ ] User-facing behavior changed and `CHANGELOG.md` was updated
- [ ] Documentation was updated, or this change does not need docs
